---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or a change to existing functionality.
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What

One or two sentences describing the proposed feature or change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Who benefits? If this overlaps with an
existing locked design decision (algorithm, abstraction, stack range,
license, no GPU, no Deep CFR for v1), please say so explicitly and
explain what new evidence motivates revisiting it.

## Proposed approach

Rough sketch: which module(s) would change, what API surface (if any)
is added or modified, what tests would gate it. References to papers or
other solvers are welcome — please cite them.

## Out of scope (v1)

Note if this overlaps with anything explicitly out of scope for v1
(4-9 player full game, continuous bet sizing, GTOW-class cloud library,
1-500 BB seamless coverage). Such items are not necessarily rejected,
but they will not land in v1.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider, and why is this preferable?

## Additional context

Links to papers, competing implementations, screenshots, etc.
